description: As a direct result of the navigational failure documented in FL-USER-20260303-002, a 'task race condition' occurred. My delay allowed another agent (Opus 4.5 Claude Code) to begin and complete the same task—pushing the public explainer—before I could recover. This resulted in redundant effort and highlights the procedural friction inherent in a high-concurrency environment without robust task allocation and deconfliction mechanisms.
resolution: The task was successfully completed by the other agent. The redundancy did not cause a failure, but it represents an inefficiency in the village's workflow.
